conditions: Re-derive effect sizes with correct d=3 values

H5.detail: Predicted finite-size correction Delta_p_c ~ 0.0016 (0.6%) is 2-3 orders of magnitude below intratumoral heterogeneity variance (10-50%). Hypothesis's own math proved the effect is undetectable.
H5.prevention_rule: Rule 15 (Uniqueness test): compute predicted_effect / biological_noise_floor; if < 0.1, do not propose

H7.detail: Backbone fraction mapped to exhausted T cells. T cell exhaustion is driven by chronic antigen stimulation (Wherry 2011), not physical confinement. Predicted direction of correlation is likely reversed.
H7.prevention_rule: For structural_isomorphism, each mathematical element must be mapped to a biological entity AND the causal mechanism connecting topology to biological state must be verified in literature

trend_position.note: S017(3.0) -> S018(2.7) -> S019(2.75) for disciplinary distance — high and stable

convergence_signals.description: PRTH-101 Anti-DDR1 + Pembrolizumab Phase 1 (270 patients) — directly tests anti-collagen receptor + checkpoint blockade
LOX inhibitor prodrugs for immunotherapy combination (ICR)
Independent confirmation of collagen I/III topology switch — published same month

highest_value_operation.result: E6 gained +0.50 composite vs H3 Ranker score via reframing subdiffusion fingerprint as VACF diagnostic
highest_value_operation.lesson: Mutation/mechanism-reframing on low-ranked parents outperforms specification on high-ranked parents

new_insights.title: Active particle Pe check mandatory for cell biology percolation
new_insights.action: For any percolation hypothesis where the walker is a biological cell, estimate Pe = v * L_p / D. If Pe > 1, standard isotropic universality class may not apply. Propose two-exponent measurement protocol.

new_insights.title: Correlated percolation as natural extension of structural isomorphism to biology
new_insights.action: When generating structural_isomorphism hypotheses in biological systems, enumerate spatial autocorrelation fields in Field C. For each, apply Weinrib 1984 perturbation theory to calculate p_c shift. Generates one additional synergy-prediction hypothesis per correlation field.

new_insights.title: Measure-not-assume evolution operation confirmed for third time
new_insights.action: Evolver should systematically convert 'predict constant X' hypotheses to 'design experiment that measures X empirically.' Valid across strategies: S011 (biphasic parameters), S017 (GEV shape parameter), S019 (universality class exponents).

new_insights.title: Citation Rule 38 extended to 1990-2015 era
new_insights.action: All citations from 1990-2015 should be flagged for venue/PMID verification in SELF-CRITIQUE. Parametric memory is unreliable for this era's citation metadata (wrong journal, wrong page numbers).

new_insights.title: Mathematical topology mapped to biological state requires causal mechanism verification
new_insights.action: For structural_isomorphism, each mathematical element (backbone, dangling end, cluster) must be mapped to a biological entity AND the causal mechanism connecting topology to biological state must be verified in literature. H7's kill was elegant topology with biologically wrong causal chain.

new_insights.title: Table row lookup is a recurring generator error — explicit row identification required
new_insights.action: When citing any parameter from a table organized by dimension, subpopulation, or system class, include explicit row label in citation: 'd=3 row: nu_perp = 0.584 (Hinrichsen 2000, Table 2)'. Auditable trail for SELF-CRITIQUE.

session_meta_insights: structural_isomorphism second confirmation: 2 PASS, 0 FAIL, 100% PASS+COND, zero hallucinations — consistent with S011
Classical physics literature (pre-1994 textbooks) = near-zero hallucination risk; risk displaced to recent biology papers
CONDITIONAL_PASS ceiling caused by sparse Field C numerical parameters (tumor ECM percolation not tabulated) — structural property of novel targets, not pipeline failure
IPS 8.3 validates LOX-collagen-T cell axis; percolation framework interpretation remains MAGELLAN-original contribution
Early-complete correctly triggered; CONDITIONAL conditions are experimental, not knowledge-based
Lowest-ranked parent (H3 → E6) produced third-highest QG score via mechanism mutation — confirms S016 pattern
DP exponent dimensional confusion (d=1 cited as d=3) is a new sub-type of factual error: correct table, wrong row
Convergence signals (NCT05753722, WO2024003558A1, Fusilier 2026) validate clinical relevance without validating percolation framework specifically
